Source: M365 Copilot What's New
URL: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/admin/whats-new-in-preview?view=o365-worldwide
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# M365 Admin Center What's New

## November 2025
- Engineering direct portal renamed to Enhanced Engagements
- Four new options: Engineering escalations, Business Process Awareness (BPAs), Customer Advisory Board (CAB), Incident Analysis
- History tab renamed to Design change requests (DCR)

## June 2025
- Copilot Search Admin experience added to M365 Admin center
- Acronyms management for organization-specific terms
- Bookmarks for quick access links to frequently used resources

## April 2025
- Microsoft 365 Copilot network connectivity test tool
- Diagnostics for latency, throughput, and service reachability

## March 2025
- Exchange Web Services (EWS) usage report added
- Insights into third-party EWS applications ahead of EWS deprecation

## February 2025
- Admin-initiated feedback for Microsoft 365 Copilot
- AI Admin role expansion, chat log prompt-response pairs selection, date range selection

## January 2025
- AI Administrator role in Microsoft 365 admin center
- Manages Copilot settings, AI-related services, app installations, insights and support
